---
title: "Patricia Iwok"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: images/profile_PatriciaIwok.jpeg
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/patricia-iwok-6a003b207
    - icon: mailbox
      text: email
      href: mailto:peiwok@uwm.edu
toc: false
editor: 
  mode: source
---

I earned my B.A. in Psychology from the University of Wisconsin Milwaukee in May 2026. My undergraduate education included my first year at Cal Poly Humboldt and a study abroad experience at the University of Birmingham in the United Kingdom during my second year before transferring to UWM to complete my degree. My research interests include learning, computational modeling, and neuroimaging. I am particularly interested in using computational and neuroimaging methods to better understand learning processes and memory. Outside of research, I enjoy exploring Milwaukee’s restaurant scene, trying new recipes, crocheting, bead making, and creating air-dry clay projects.
